2603.28998.title: Design Principles for the Construction of a Benchmark Evaluating Security Operation Capabilities of Multi-agent AI Systems
2603.28998.paper_summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) and multi-agent AI systems are demonstrating increasing potential in cybersecurity operations, organizations, policymakers, model providers, and researchers in the AI and cybersecurity communities are interested in quantifying the capabilities of such AI systems to achieve more autonomous SOCs (security operation centers) and reduce manual effort. In particular, the AI and cybersecurity communities have recently developed several benchmarks for evaluating the red team capabilities of multi-agent AI systems. However, because the operations in SOCs are dominated by blue team operations, the capabilities of AI systems & agents to achieve more autonomous SOCs cannot be evaluated without a benchmark focused on blue team operations. To our best knowledge, no systematic benchmark for evaluating coordinated multi-task blue team AI has been proposed in the literature. Existing blue team benchmarks focus on a particular task. The goal of this work is to develop a set of design principles for the construction of a benchmark, which is denoted as SOC-bench, to evaluate the blue team capabilities of AI. Following these design principles, we have developed a conceptual design of SOC-bench, which consists of a family of five blue team tasks in the context of large-scale ransomware attack incident response.
2603.28998.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）和多代理人工智慧系統在網路安全操作中顯示出越來越大的潛力，組織、政策制定者、模型提供者以及人工智慧和網路安全社群的研究人員對量化這些人工智慧系統的能力以實現更自主的安全運作中心（SOCs）並減少人工努力產生了興趣。特別是，人工智慧和網路安全社群最近開發了幾個基準來評估多代理人工智慧系統的紅隊能力。然而，由於安全運作中心的操作主要由藍隊操作主導，因此沒有針對藍隊操作的基準，就無法評估人工智慧系統和代理實現更自主的安全運作中心的能力。據我們所知，文獻中尚未提出系統性評估協調多任務藍隊人工智慧的基準。現有的藍隊基準專注於特定任務。本研究的目標是制定一套設計原則，用於構建一個基準，稱為SOC-bench，以評估人工智慧的藍隊能力。根據這些設計原則，我們已經開發了SOC-bench的概念設計，該設計包含五個藍隊任務，背景為大規模勒索病毒攻擊事件響應。
2603.28998.author: Yicheng Cai et.al.
2603.28998.authors: Yicheng Cai, Mitchell John DeStefano, Guodong Dong, Pulkit Handa, Peng Liu, Tejas Singhal, Peiyu Tseng, Winston Jen White
